arts.sum: Roma have won 18 of their last 22 games against Udinese in Serie A (D1 L3) – since the 2013/14 season, the Giallorossi have won more games (18) and kept more clean sheets (11) against this opponent than any other. Roma have scored 182 goals in their 100 previous meetings with Udinese in Serie A: an average of 1.82 goals per game - the highest for the Giallorossi against any opponent they’ve faced more than 60 times in the top-flight.

arts.ttl: Roma CEO Under Police Protection Amid Fan Backlash
arts.sum: These are delicate times for Roma CEO Lina Souloukou after provoking fans' anger with the recent dismissal of Daniele De Rossi. According to La Repubblica, fears over Souloukou's safety have convinced local authorities to place her under police protection. arts.ttl: Roma CEO Lina Souloukou under police protection amid dan backlash
arts.sum: Roma’s CEO Lina Souloukou has been placed under police protection following threats and insults from a section of the club’s supporters. This development comes just days after the controversial dismissal of head coach Daniele De Rossi, a decision that has sparked outrage among some fans. Sportface report that while a full security detail has not yet been assigned, authorities are closely monitoring the situation. The Committee for Order and Security at the prefecture will conduct a thorough assessment in the coming days to determine if a permanent escort is necessary. This decision will be based on detailed discussions and evaluations The post Roma CEO Lina Souloukou under police protection amid dan backlash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Udinese’s Runjaic: “I want a happy and optimistic team”
arts.sum: Udinese manager Kosta Runjaic previewed his team’s upcoming match against Roma, emphasizing focus on their own performance rather than their opponents’ situation. Despite Udinese’s strong start to the season, Runjaic remains grounded, stating, “We’re happy to be top and to give our fans a great experience, but we’re not looking at the league table, nor our opponents’ situation. We’re focused on the match.” The coach acknowledged the challenge of facing Roma, especially with their new manager, but expressed confidence in his team’s readiness. “We want to be brave and deliver a good performance. arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Udinese: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Olimpico will host a fascinating Serie A encounter on Sunday as crisis-hit Roma take on surprise league leaders Udinese. This match pits two teams experiencing vastly different starts to the 2024/25 campaign against each other in what promises to be an intriguing battle. Roma enter this fixture in a state of turmoil following the shock dismissal of club legend Daniele De Rossi as head coach earlier this week. Despite being handed a three-year contract extension in the summer, De Rossi was brutally sacked after just eight months in charge as Roma’s poor start to the season continued. arts.ttl: Did Dybala get Roma legend De Rossi sacked?
arts.sum: Paulo Dybala's contract situation had a part to play in Daniele de Rossi's shock sacking as Roma boss, according to Italian media. The Italian outlet claims that Dybala's contract contains an automatic extension clause that will be triggered if he plays at least 45 minutes in 50 per cent of Roma's games this term.

arts.ttl: Juric takes the helm at Roma: “A great opportunity”
arts.sum: Newly appointed AS Roma manager Ivan Juric held his first press conference ahead of the upcoming match against Udinese, expressing optimism about his new role and the team’s potential. Juric, who replaced Daniele De Rossi earlier this week, began by praising the team’s recent performances: “The team with Daniele has shown in recent months that it is up to par with the others. arts.ttl: Roma Ditch De Rossi Again – The Inevitable Downfall of the Prince that Was Promised
arts.sum: In the less-than-perfect world we live in, not all love stories are meant to have a happy ending. And more often than not, a rekindled relationship will suffer the same unsavory fate of its predecessor. And yet, few can avoid the lure of their first love. This, in a nutshell, is the story of Roma and its beloved hero Daniele De Rossi.
